triggers: A dying stranger presses a marked coin into the party's hand
A local disappears after publicly naming the threat
The settlement's bells ring from underground
A reward is posted in three mutually hostile shrines
major_goals: recover the stolen relic before it is awakened
find the missing scouts and learn what they saw
break the pact poisoning the settlement
reach the sealed chamber before the rival expedition
obstacles: a rival band with official authority
a route altered by supernatural weather
the key witness refuses to speak while sober
the enemy can imitate trusted voices
locales: a caravan road through cursed hills
locale_features: a door that opens for a confessed secret
an altar built over a deep shaft
murals that change after each death
a bridge made from fused swords
phenomena: time slips forward around open wounds
the dead answer one question at sunset
moonlight turns spilled blood into crystal
villain_goals: restore a defeated god through borrowed bodies
erase evidence of an ancient betrayal
force the settlement into a new blood pact
open a road into a dead empire
artifacts_or_relics: a map tattooed on living skin
themes: power built on a forgotten crime
first_clues: the cave's ward bears a recently used town seal
the missing scouts bought lamp oil but no food
the same symbol appears beneath three local beds
the relic is useless unless willingly surrendered
failure_consequences: the local threat gains legal authority over the town
the dungeon's corruption reaches the wells
a rival claims the relic and becomes untouchable
the settlement must be abandoned before winter
time_pressures: three nights remain before the red moon
the rival expedition leaves at dawn
each sunset another villager falls into a deathlike sleep
floodwater will seal the lower caves within two days
noncombat_paths: expose the villain's broken oath and demand judgment
restore the old wards using local testimony
steal the objective while the monsters observe their ritual truce
